actions.expression:
SELECT shipmentapply.sid,
       shipmentapply.shipmentID1,
       shipmentapply.policyNo,
       shipmentapply.clientNo,
       shipmentapply.buyerNo,
       shipmentapply.corpBuyerNo,
       shipmentapply.bankNo,
       shipmentapply.corpBankNo,
       shipmentapply.bankCountryCode,
       shipmentapply.bankCountryName,
       shipmentapply.buyerEngName,
       shipmentapply.buyerEngAddr,
       shipmentapply.buyerChnName,
       shipmentapply.buyerChnAddr,
       shipmentapply.bankEngName,
       shipmentapply.bankChnName,
       shipmentapply.bankAddr,
       shipmentapply.buyerCountryCode,
       shipmentapply.buyerRegNo,
       shipmentapply.buyerTel,
       shipmentapply.buyerFax,
       shipmentapply.ifFinancing,
       shipmentapply.item1,
       shipmentapply.item2,
       shipmentapply.item3,
       shipmentapply.item4,
       shipmentapply.item5,
       shipmentapply.remark,
       shipmentapply.ywbm,
       shipmentapply.invoiceNo,
       shipmentapply.invoiceSum,
       shipmentapply.insureSum,
       shipmentapply.moneyId,
       shipmentapply.payTerm,
       shipmentapply.payMode,
       shipmentapply.feePayMode,
       shipmentapply.trafficCode,
       shipmentapply.transportDate,
       shipmentapply.code10,
       shipmentapply.goodsName,
       shipmentapply.customsBillNo,
       shipmentapply.applicantName,
       shipmentapply.applyTime,
       shipmentapply.clientNo1,
       shipmentapply.policyNo1,
       shipmentapply.invoiceNo1,
       shipmentapply.transportDate1,
       shipmentapply.insureSum1
FROM shipmentapply 
WHERE (shipmentapply.corpSerialNo=[出运变更申请.企业内部申报流水号]) 
ORDER BY shipmentapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
SELECT shipmentapply.sid,
       shipmentapply.policyNo,
       shipmentapply.clientNo,
       shipmentapply.buyerNo,
       shipmentapply.corpBuyerNo,
       shipmentapply.bankNo,
       shipmentapply.corpBankNo,
       shipmentapply.bankCountryCode,
       shipmentapply.bankCountryName,
       shipmentapply.buyerEngName,
       shipmentapply.buyerEngAddr,
       shipmentapply.buyerChnName,
       shipmentapply.buyerChnAddr,
       shipmentapply.bankEngName,
       shipmentapply.bankChnName,
       shipmentapply.bankAddr,
       shipmentapply.buyerCountryCode,
       shipmentapply.buyerRegNo,
       shipmentapply.buyerTel,
       shipmentapply.buyerFax,
       shipmentapply.state,
       shipmentapply.item1,
       shipmentapply.item2,
       shipmentapply.item3,
       shipmentapply.item4,
       shipmentapply.item5,
       shipmentapply.remark,
       shipmentapply.ywbm,
       shipmentapply.invoiceNo,
       shipmentapply.invoiceSum,
       shipmentapply.insureSum,
       shipmentapply.moneyId,
       shipmentapply.payTerm,
       shipmentapply.payMode,
       shipmentapply.feePayMode,
       shipmentapply.trafficCode,
       shipmentapply.transportDate,
       shipmentapply.code10,
       shipmentapply.goodsName,
       shipmentapply.customsBillNo,
       shipmentapply.applicantName,
       shipmentapply.applyTime,
       shipmentapply.clientNo1,
       shipmentapply.policyNo1,
       shipmentapply.invoiceNo1,
       shipmentapply.transportDate1,
       shipmentapply.notifyTime1,
       shipmentapply.insureSum1,
       shipmentapply.shipmentID1,
       shipmentapply.corpSerialNo
FROM shipmentapply 
WHERE (shipmentapply.invoiceNo=[出运变更申请.发票编号]) 
  AND permission('') 
ORDER BY shipmentapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.sid ASC

caption: 出运变更申请

view.params:
SELECT shipmentapply.corpSerialNo
FROM shipmentapply
WHERE   ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (shipmentapply.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (shipmentapply.sys_path LIKE :c_depart)))
ORDER BY shipmentapply.corpSerialNo ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm
FROM ywrybiao
WHERE   (ywrybiao.bm like "%外销%")
 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.yhm ASC
